title: Bridge Essay: Reductions in perceived stress following Transcendental Meditation practice are

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

**Reductions in perceived stress following Transcendental Meditation practice are associated with increased brain regional connectivity at rest.**. Brain Cogn.. PMID: 31945602. DOI: 10.1016/j.bandc.2020.105517. Transcendental Meditation (TM) is defined as amental process of transcending using asilent mantra. Previous work showed that relatively brief period of TM practice leads to decreases in stress and anxiety. However, whether these changes are subserved by specific morpho-functional brain modifications (as observed in other meditation techniques) is still unclear.
